title: Audit Record
description: Common v1 audit record for business and control actions that require traceability.
$comment: Source: TECH-01 Audit Record Standard lists audit ID, actor, role snapshot, permission, action, object, state, reason, result, environment, source channel, correlation ID, idempotency key, timestamp, and safe metadata.

auditCategory.description: Audit category from TECH-01 audit category model.

permissionChecked.description: Permission checked for the action, when applicable.

action.description: Action being audited. Prefer values from enums/common/audit-action.yaml when one exists.

objectType.description: Type of object affected by the action.

objectId.description: Identifier of the object affected by the action.

fromState.description: Previous state, if the action changes state.

toState.description: Next state, if the action changes state.

reason.description: Reason for a risky, denied, blocked, fallback, suppression, or correction action.

result.description: Audit result from TECH-01 Audit Record Standard.

failureReason.description: Reason when result is FAILED or DENIED.

environment.description: Environment from TECH-01 Audit Record Standard.

sourceChannel.description: Source channel from TECH-01 Audit Record Standard.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID for request or flow traceability.

idempotencyKey.description: Idempotency key when the audited command is idempotent.

metadata.description: Safe metadata only. Do not include secrets, full payment credentials, or unnecessary sensitive data.
